'''wajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bone|bone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bone|bone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wajate|wajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wajatesher|wajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajatesherĂ«m|wajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wajatero|wajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wajateshĂ«|wajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajateshĂ«m|wajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwajatero|gokiwajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwajateshĂ«|gokiwajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajateshĂ«m|gokiwajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowajankerom|gowajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowajankeshĂ«|gowajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajankeshĂ«m|gowajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowajankeya|gowajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wajaterom|wajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajatemu|wajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wajateya|wajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwajaterom|gokiwajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajatemu|gokiwajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwajateya|gokiwajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wajajate|wajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wajajatesher|wajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajajatesherĂ«m|wajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wajajatero|wajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wajajateshĂ«|wajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajajateshĂ«m|wajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwajajatero|gokiwajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwajajateshĂ«|gokiwajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajajateshĂ«m|gokiwajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowajajankerom|gowajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowajajankeshĂ«|gowajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajajankeshĂ«m|gowajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowajajankeya|gowajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wajajaterom|wajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajajatemu|wajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wajajateya|wajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwajajaterom|gokiwajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajajatemu|gokiwajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwajajateya|gokiwajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠte|wĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠtesher|wĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠtero|wĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠterom|wĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠtemu|wĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠjĂŠteya|wĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠjĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafjafte|wafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafjaftesher|wafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafjaftesherĂ«m|wafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafjaftero|wafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafjafteshĂ«|wafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafjafteshĂ«m|wafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafjaftero|gokiwafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafjafteshĂ«|gokiwafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafjafteshĂ«m|gokiwafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafjafnkerom|gowafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafjafnkeshĂ«|gowafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafjafnkeshĂ«m|gowafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafjafnkeya|gowafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafjafterom|wafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafjaftemu|wafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafjafteya|wafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafjafterom|gokiwafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafjaftemu|gokiwafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafjafteya|gokiwafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
